    C

    ClassesManager - Class in data
    Manages the collection of MusicBand objects, providing access and modification methods.
    cleanFile() - Method in class filemanager.json.JsonCleaner
    Attempts to clean the file by opening it in append mode and writing nothing.
    cleanFile() - Method in class filemanager.json.JsonParser
    Cleans (truncates) the JSON file by delegating to JsonCleaner.cleanFile().

    clearCollection() - Method in class data.ClassesManager
    Removes all elements from the collection.
    Colors - Enum Class in termenalmanager
    Provides ANSI color codes for console output formatting.

    Abstract base class for all commands in the application.

    CommandsReader - Class in filemanager.commandsparser
    Handles reading and execution of commands from script files.
    compareTo(MusicBand) - Method in class dataclasses.MusicBand
    Compares this MusicBand with another MusicBand.

    Represents the coordinates of a music band.

    Default constructor for Coordinates.

    Constructs a Coordinates object with the specified x and y values.

    createCommandByName(String) - Method in class data.DataCommands
    Parses and executes a command based on the input string without additional parameters.
    createCommandByName(String, MusicBand) - Method in class data.DataCommands
    Parses and executes a command with an additional MusicBand parameter.
